sections.paragraph:
(cognate to the verb כָּתַר which see), to surround, whether in a hostile manner (followed by אֶל), 1Sa 23:26 or for protection, followed by two acc. Ps. 5:13 .

Piel עִטֵּר to surround with a crown, to crown, followed by two acc. Psa 8:6 65:12 103:4 (metaph.); followed by a dat. of pers. Son 3:11.

Hiphil, i.q. Piel; Isa 23:8, צֹר הַמַּעֲטִירָה “Tyre, the crowning,” i.e. distributing crowns, or diadems, from the royal dignity in the Phœnician colonies resting on the authority of the senate of Tyre. Hence-
